goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: All failures come from global checked-row opacity 0.55 compositing generated fields, provenance, and intake content. Child opacity cannot undo parent compositing. Restore opacity 1 only for checked shopping items containing the module-local intake editor, retaining checkbox and line-through cues; existing palette then renders at accessible contrast.

worker_package.objective: Add one CSS-only checked-editor opacity override, then run isolated build, new grocery E2E, both protected E2Es, and final integrity.
verify: Require CSS pre-hash 746CA18B02080C844FED69C3AF45422C41CF54D8AB76B62FE06637D6A6B93779 and protected E2E hashes.
Run scoped format, mirror hashes, isolated webpack build.
Run unchanged new grocery and both protected browser oracles including axe.
Release port and prove CSS-only diff/protected hashes.
stop_if: Any non-CSS file, DOM/layout/semantics/test behavior changes.
Protected oracle needs edit or shared/live/secret/normal data would be touched.

evidence: Reported colors are composited rather than literal declarations.
Global checked opacity covers provenance and intake descendants.
Restoring parent opacity preserves existing accessible direct colors and line-through cue.

parallel_safety.rationale: One CSS, build, and three serial oracles share a mirror/port lifecycle.

required_board_updates: Keep T999 blocked and require another Judge.
